2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.2.7 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3012.issue: [S3012] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 0.2.7 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/muffin142/ioBroker.fyta/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/muffin142/ioBroker.fyta/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

0048.issue: [S0048] At least one devDpendency at [package.json](https://github.com/muffin142/ioBroker.fyta/blob/master/package.json) requires a specific version. Consider using "~1.2.3" or "^1.2.3" syntax unless freezing dependencies is really desired.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.10.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/muffin142/ioBroker.fyta/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
